top_signals.title: Billionaire families bet on semiconductor and energy stocks in first quarter during Iran war
top_signals.summary: Private investment firms of David Tepper and other billionaires doubled down on chipmakers despite the Iran war pressuring data center economics.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dimon Says Rates Risk Going Much Higher After Bond Selloff
top_signals.summary: Jamie Dimon said interest rates may climb much further, a warning to bond investors at a time when yields have touched multi-year highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
